task_description: Answer seismic design questions for structural engineers using NIST steel moment frame guidance.

questions.query: What are steel special moment frames used for?
questions.gold_hint: seismic design lateral force resisting system

questions.query: What is the purpose of seismic design requirements for SMFs?
What is interstory drift and why does it matter?
How are beam-column connections designed for seismic loads?
What role does ductility play in seismic performance?
What analysis methods are recommended for SMF design?
